title: 20PCS Floral Window Fly Stickers, Flies Sticker Trap for Indoor Insect Pest Attractor and Eliminator
features: Exploits the attraction to light and warmth, discreet, attractive, practical, simple solution to bothersome house flies.
Non-toxic and safer to use around children and pets.
Powerful adhesive will hold largest houseflies, effective for up to 3 months.
Easy to remove will leaves no sticky trace when removed from the window.
Easy to use, come with a detailed use instruction. Value package total 20pcs.
description: Product Description 20PCS Window Fly Sticks for Insect Flies Pest Control Principle : Exploits the attraction that flies have to windows and light, sticking mosquitoes or other flying insects when fast on contact, preventing them from getting all the way into the room. Why use the sunflower style stickers from Plai? Non-toxic with no chemicals or poisons. Easy to set up and use. Effective against most house pests. Strong and double-sided adhesive fly trap stickers Highly-effective for up to 3 months constant use. Decorative floral design can be placed on practically any window near to where fly activity is seen. Window Fly Stickers: Package include:5 Packs *4 Traps Each Package Sunflower Stickers Size: 95 x 95mm. Durable & Reusable Apply for various occasion: Kitchen Sink: There is usually more flying insects around the kitchen counters, sinks or dishwashers, you can stick to your windows or wall and catch the gnat or flying insect. Trash Can: You’ll typically spot flying insects swarming around kitchen near garbage cans. Place our sunflower window fly stickers near kitchen waste bins can easy slove the flying insects problem. Studyroom: The window fly traps specially designed for interior scenes, non-toxic and reusable, it can be used many times Bedroom: Easily solve the problem of flying insects when you have a rest
